---
title: "Baseline pupil size is related to fluid intelligence: A reply to Unsworth et al. (2021)"

pub-authors:
  - Tsukahara
  - Draheim
  - Engle

pub-year: "2021"
date: "2021-10-01"
venue: "Cognition"
pub-type: "Empirical Article"
pub-status: "Published"

pdf: "/publications/2021/cog-pupil-luminance-reply/Tsukahara_et_al_2021_Cognition.pdf"
data: ""
code: ""
doi: "10.1016/j.cognition.2021.104826"
link: ""

listing-page: false
format: html
---
